mfa.heading: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Add a second factor to protect your account from password theft.

setup.title: Set up authenticator app
setup.instructions: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.

disable.title: Disable two-factor authentication
disable.instructions: Confirm your password and a current code to disable the second factor.

passkeys.heading: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Use a hardware key or your device biometrics as a phishing-resistant second factor.

login.mfaPrompt: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
